name: China Minmetals Rare Earth Co., Ltd.
summary: China Minmetals Rare Earth Co., Ltd. produces and distributes rare earth oxides, rare earth metals, and rare earth processed products in China and internationally. The company offers lanthanum, cerium, neodymium, europium, gadolinium, terbium, dysprosium, holmium, erbium, lutetium, praseodymium, samarium, and yttrium oxides. It also provides rare earth techniques research and consulting services. The company was formerly known as Shanxi Guanlu Co., Ltd. and changed its name to China Minmetals Rare Earth Co., Ltd. in March 2013. China Minmetals Rare Earth Co., Ltd. was founded in 1998 and is based in Ganzhou, China.
